3029480.name: multi-Path
3029480.description:
In the world of lightness and darkness, Let's make a Path by connect the dots.

Move the dots to draw curve pass the gate.

May be multiple paths pass the gate.
Able to get pass all the gates in one path, or all take different paths.
Please make sure of each curve drawn by moving dots.

This game has many ways to move the points.
Sometimes move just one dot, or move several dots at once.
Symmetric moving, Manipulate the radius of the circle and more methods.
May be some dots that cannot be move.

You will always find a path to a goal.
No time limit so no need to rush.
All it takes is a little imagination.
Just relax and play.

Let's start your journey to lead the light.

How to Play

The goal of this puzzle is passing all the gates using curves derived from lines that connecting points.
You have to do is to adjust curves by moving points.
You can play in a relaxed atmosphere.

Controls

  • Move points
    Keyboard: WASD, Arrows
    Game pad: Left stick
  • Switch points
    Keyboard: QE, ZC, Space
    Mouse: Wheel
    Game pad: LB/RB, L3
  • Move a camera
    Keyboard: Ctrl+WASD, Ctrl+Arrows
    Mouse: Move
    Game pad: Right stick
  • Show Settings
    Keyboard: Escape
    Mouse: Middle button
    Game pad: Start

Type of Points/h2]
  • Move a point.


  • Move two points with line symmetry.


  • Move two points with point symmetry.


  • Move multiple points by changing the radius and angle of the circle.


  • Move multiple points by changing the center of the circle.


  • A single fixed point.


  • A pair of movable and fixed points.
